_publications._publicationTitle: Tumor suppressor alterations cooperate to drive aggressive mesotheliomas with enriched cancer stem cells via a p53-miR-34a-c-Met axis.

_contextSnippet: treatment with SU11274 significantly reduced the invasiveness of all three MM cell lines from Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice... MM cells grown in a spheroid assay were treated with SU11274 and SGX-523, and both inhibitors significantly reduced the size of spheroids formed without affecting cell viability
details: Significantly reduced invasiveness of all three MM cell lines from Nf2+/−;p16/p19+/− mice and significantly reduced size of spheroids formed without affecting cell viability
